name: Tomato Treat
recipeInstructions:
Puntalette is rice-shaped pasta. Other small pasta
may be used.
Drain the can of salmon, reserving the juice. Flake the fish.
Put the courgette in a bowl, sprinkle with salt. Leave for 30 minutes then rinse thoroughly. Cook the puntalette in water in a covered microwave proof bowl for 10 minutes on HIGH POWER. Rinse and drain.
Cut tomatoes into flower shapes. Discard pips and tough core. Allow to stand for a further 10 minutes, then add courgette, sweetcorn, spring onion and salmon. Whisk the reserved salmon juice with remaining ingredients then pour into puntalette mixture. Mix well. Pile into tomato shells and serve.
Serves 4-6. Approx. 170 kcals per serving
